t.isThemeGetter=!0,t},Gc=/^\[(?:(\w[\w-]*):)?(.+)\]$/i,Xc=/^\((?:(\w[\w-]*):)?(.+)\)$/i,Um=/^\d+(?:\.\d+)?\/\d+(?:\.\d+)?$/,Wm=/^(\d+(\.\d+)?)?(xs|sm|md|lg|xl)$/,Ym=/\d+(%|px|r?em|[sdl]?v([hwib]|min|max)|pt|pc|in|cm|mm|cap|ch|ex|r?lh|cq(w|h|i|b|min|max))|\b(calc|min|max|clamp)\(.+\)|^0$/,Km=/^(rgba?|hsla?|hwb|(ok)?(lab|lch)|color-mix)\(.+\)$/,Gm=/^(inset_)?-?((\d+)?\.?(\d+)[a-z]+|0)_-?((\d+)?\.?(\d+)[a-z]+|0)/,Xm=/^(url|image|image-set|cross-fade|element|(repeating-)?(linear|radial|conic)-gradient)\(.+\)$/,So=e=>Um.test(e),ge=e=>!!e&&!Number.isNaN(Number(e)),Co=e=>!!e&&Number.isInteger(Number(e)),xs=e=>e.endsWith("%")&&ge(e.slice(0,-1)),lo=e=>Wm.test(e),qc=()=>!0,qm=e=>Ym.test(e)&&!Km.test(e),ks=()=>!1,Jm=e=>Gm.test(e),Zm=e=>Xm.test(e),Qm=e=>!V(e)&&!U(e),ev=e=>To(e,ou,ks),V=e=>Gc.test(e),Wo=e=>To(e,ru,qm),Jc=e=>To(e,lv,ge),tv=e=>To(e,iu,qc),ov=e=>To(e,nu,ks),Zc=e=>To(e,eu,ks),rv=e=>To(e,tu,Zm),Qn=e=>To(e,su,Jm),U=e=>Xc.test(e),qr=e=>Yo(e,ru),nv=e=>Yo(e,nu),Qc=e=>Yo(e,eu),iv=e=>Yo(e,ou),sv=e=>Yo(e,tu),ei=e=>Yo(e,su,!0),av=e=>Yo(e,iu,!0),To=(e,t,o)=>{const
